历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 1627, significantly shifted to 8420 in 2024 (abnormal fluctuation), and notably recovered to about 2035 in 2025. The rankings have fluctuated sharply in the past three years, with a baseline of about 2035 in 2025. The provincial science enrollment plan was 26 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and sharply dropped to 7 in 2025, maintaining 7 in 2026, consistent with 2025 but significantly reduced compared to 2023-2024, with the competition base already notably narrowed.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 29th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 28-31 range in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities in China. Reputation is stable, with no negative public opinion in the past five years' reputation documents. Douyin popularity total ranking 28th (relatively hot), once ranked 3rd in 2024 (very hot), with high social attention. No record of admission cutoff gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Education A+, Physical Education A+, Statistics A+, World History A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Geography A, Psychology A, Mathematics A, Ecology A, Software Engineering A, etc., with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended, while normal/education majors are differentiated and wait-and-see. In 2025, the number of science examinees in the province is about 52,538, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 238,000, with an estimated 163,000 science examinees based on historical proportions, a significant increase in examinee scale, but competition intensification is not included in the judgment. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to Xinjiang examinees, and Shanghai's regional advantage has a positive effect on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2035, the 2026 enrollment plan consistent with 2025, a significant increase in provincial science examinees, good school reputation, and strong disciplinary strength, competition is expected to slightly intensify, with the ranking moving forward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2005, with a range of 1744-2266.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1700), you can focus on aiming for top majors such as Software Engineering and Mathematics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 2200), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors for a safe application.
